paper.title: Playful AI in Professional Email: A Field Experiment on Tone and Recipient Engagement
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v1 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_check: Readable extraction begins with the title, authors, affiliations, and abstract; includes results, methods, references, appendix, company table, and treatment-compliance sensitivity table; ends at the final replying-path result. No Unicode replacement characters were found.

official_release.data_availability: README.md states that the 16,880-row de-identified email-level dataset is not distributed in the repository and is available only on reasonable request to the authors, subject to ethical considerations. It further states that no raw email text, names, or addresses exist in that dataset.
official_release.acquisition_scope: Pinned and archived the complete four-file official repository snapshot. README.md, analysis_pipeline.R, and analysis_verification.py were inspected enough to verify expected input columns, the absent request-only dataset, sender-level mixed/GEE/Cox analysis structure, fixed 14-day open and 40-day reply censoring in code, within-sender positivity centering, Sobel mediation, and the R-versus-Python estimator distinction. No analysis was executed because data/emails.csv is not released. This is acquisition evidence, not a deep release audit or paper review.

local_storage_note: The PDF, release ZIP, and extracted repository are intentionally ignored local evidence. The extracted paper text, arXiv metadata, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable or commit-pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
